body.text: Day Zero in Virginia: the hardware bans are unenforceable as of this morning — and the Fifth Circuit opened a second front on §922(g)

The Santolla v. Katz statewide injunction is operative today: covered-rifle and magazine sales resume while the Commonwealth's appeal hangs over everything. And the en banc Fifth Circuit vacated U.S. v. Squire — §922(g)(1) will be reheard as a facial Commerce Clause challenge.

facts.title: 2. 5th Cir. Squire en banc — 922(g) Commerce Clause
3. 3rd Cir. NJ strikedown, Day 4 — response pending

body.text:
• Virginia Day 0: injunction operative; held orders ship today
• 5th Cir. grants en banc rehearing in Squire — §922(g) on the line
• SCOTUS order list: no 2A action; next list Aug 17
• CRS hands Congress its Hemani roadmap for §922(g) review
